css: body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.4; } table { width: 100% !important; border-collapse: collapse; margin-bottom: 15px; table-layout: auto; } th, td { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 6px; font-size: 9px; text-align: left; word-break: break-word; overflow-wrap: break-word; } th { background-color: #f2f2f2; font-weight: bold; } h1, h2, h3 { page-break-after: avoid; } tr { page-break-inside: avoid; }
